title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・盾の重さ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Between the sloped track and the 3,200-meter
distance, Meisho Doto falls short against T.M.
Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rest of the year will be just as long and
difficult a journey as today, though. Doto
desperately resolves to follow Opera O through
to the end.
